description:
We are DataFlow Inc, a fully remote analytics company. We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist with experience in Python, scikit-learn and deep learning frameworks.

  • Build predictive models
  • Work with large datasets
  • Deploy to production via MLflow
CloudPipe is hiring a Data Engineer to build our next-generation data platform. You will use Apache Spark, dbt, and Airflow to move and transform petabytes of data daily.

We're building the next generation of AI systems. Join us as an ML Engineer to design, train and deploy large-scale models using PyTorch and Kubernetes.

Requirements: 3+ years experience, strong Python, familiarity with distributed training.
